HAKUREIREIMU-COUNTER.title: Counter
HAKUREIREIMU-COUNTER.description:
Counter activate when an enemy performs a matching [gold]Action[/gold].
The number shows how many [blue]Times[/blue] they can trigger before discard.
HAKUREIREIMU-ATTACK.title: Attack
HAKUREIREIMU-ATTACK.description: Intents that deals to the player is considered an attack.
HAKUREIREIMU-BUFF.title: Buff
HAKUREIREIMU-BUFF.description: Intents that gives [gold]Buff[/gold], [blue]Block[/blue], or [green]Healing[/green] is considered a buff.
HAKUREIREIMU-DEBUFF.title: Debuff
HAKUREIREIMU-DEBUFF.description: Intents that inflicts a [red]Negative[/red] effect or give [color=gray]Status[/color] cards is considered a debuff.
HAKUREIREIMU-ALL.title: All
HAKUREIREIMU-IMMEDIATE.title: Preemptively
HAKUREIREIMU-IMMEDIATE.description: Will be activated [gold]Before[/gold] the enemy's action is executed.
HAKUREIREIMU-FREECOUNTER.title: Free
HAKUREIREIMU-FREECOUNTER.description: This activation without reducing [gold]Counter[/gold] Card's counts.
HAKUREIREIMU-IGNOREDEFENSE.title: Exorcism
HAKUREIREIMU-IGNOREDEFENSE.description:
Deal damage ignore [blue]Block[/blue] and [gold]Defensive[/gold] powers.
[gold]Defensive[/gold] powers: Such as various types of damage reduction.
